hero.title: Ruby's Music Rainforest
hero.subtitle: Discover your beautiful voice in the rainforest of music

about.headline: Even the smallest spark can light up a musical dream
about.description: Teacher Ruby graduated from XX Conservatory of Music and has over ten years of vocal teaching experience. She believes everyone has a unique voice, just like every frog in the rainforest has its own song. Through scientific vocal techniques and a natural approach to music, she helps students discover their own voice.
about.philosophy: Teaching philosophy: Let music return to nature, let singing come from the heart.

scientific.title: Scientific Vocal Training
scientific.desc: Just as a little frog uses its vocal sac to sing, we teach the most scientific methods of natural resonance

nature.title: Music & Nature
nature.desc: Cultivate musicality in harmony with natural rhythms and unlock your performance potential

language.title: Music & Language
language.desc: Learn Chinese through music in an engaging and joyful way

featuredCourses.subtitle: Courses designed for different ages and stages

adult.title: Adult Courses
adult.desc: Discover your singing potential, from beginner to confident performer

kids.title: Kids Courses
kids.desc: Grow through music, building confidence and expressiveness

early.title: Early Childhood Courses
early.desc: Musical enlightenment to start your little one's artistic journey

showcase.headline: Every student is one of a kind
showcase.subtitle: Your progress is our greatest pride

cta.title: Ready to start your musical journey?
cta.subtitle: Get in touch and take the first step

duo.title: Duo Lessons (Bring a Friend)
duo.desc: Learn together with a friend, motivate each other, and enjoy the joy of music
